bead.title: availability: sparkline column + FEAT-021 dashboard tile
bead.description: Add sparkline column (success rate over time) per Performance row. Dashboard tile aggregating top-N performers.
bead.acceptance: 1. Sparkline column visible. 2. Dashboard tile present. 3. Tests cover both.
